form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Form hard to fault. Most recently tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 8 at this track Bm78 on March 28 over 1600m, long-neck behind Sarrismo with 58kg at $2.30. The start before that came from midfield and won by 1.0 len at this track Cl5 February 25 over 1630m defeating June carrying 57kg at $2.40. In good form and looms as the obvious threat.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resuming eased back early on 8th of 11 at Eagle Farm Cg&E Cl6 on March 7 over 1200m, slow going 6 len behind Bundella with 49kg at $26. Last start sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 12 at this track 3&4yo Hcp on March 28 over 1350m, head behind Tomba with 50.5kg at $19. Encouraging effort last time out. Draws the fence and has just 49kgs which brings him right into contention.
